column3: "Senna detoxifies the body" refers to its laxative property, which helps eliminate waste and toxins from the intestines.
"Senna promotes weight loss" refers to its ability to facilitate bowel movements, which can help decrease a person's body weight by eliminating excess waste material more frequently.
"Senna lowers cholesterol levels" refers to its ability to help regulate and reduce high cholesterol within one's body, aiding in maintaining good health.

"Senna regulates digestive system" refers to its ability to improve and manage the function of the gastrointestinal tract by balancing movement and cleansing process, ultimately aiding in proper digestion and alleviating constipation.
"Senna supports cardiovascular health" refers to its ability to improve blood circulation and contribute towards heart wellness.
"Senna reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to alleviate swelling and pain caused by conditions related to body irritation or injury.
"Senna enhances immune function" refers to its ability to boost and strengthen the body's defense system against various diseases and infections.
"Senna improves skin health" refers to its ability to enhance the appearance and condition of our skin due to its various nurturing properties.
"Senna relieves constipation" refers to its ability to help alleviate difficulty in passing stool, due to its laxative properties that facilitate and quicken bowel movements.
"Senna boosts energy levels" refers to its ability to enhance the body's endurance, performance, and vitality by providing an increase in energy supply.
